user.title: Add Pi-hole Instance
user.description: Configure a Pi-hole v6 instance. You can add multiple instances — each will be managed separately and can be synced.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this Pi-hole instance
data_description.port: Port number (80 for LXC, 8080 for Docker)
data_description.webui_url: HTTPS URL for the Pi-hole WebUI (e.g. https://pihole.example.com)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Pi-hole. Check host and port.

abort.already_configured: This Pi-hole instance is already configured.

add_denied_domain.name: Add Denied Domain
add_denied_domain.description: Add a domain to the deny list on all Pi-hole instances.

remove_denied_domain.name: Remove Denied Domain
remove_denied_domain.description: Remove a domain from the deny list on all Pi-hole instances.

add_allowed_domain.name: Add Allowed Domain
add_allowed_domain.description: Add a domain to the allow list on all Pi-hole instances.

remove_allowed_domain.name: Remove Allowed Domain
remove_allowed_domain.description: Remove a domain from the allow list on all Pi-hole instances.

add_dns_record.name: Add DNS Record
add_dns_record.description: Add a local DNS record on all Pi-hole instances.

ip.name: IP Address
ip.description: The IP address for the record.

domain.name: Domain
domain.description: The domain name for the record.

remove_dns_record.name: Remove DNS Record
remove_dns_record.description: Remove a local DNS record from all Pi-hole instances.

ip.name: IP Address
ip.description: The IP address of the record.

domain.name: Domain
domain.description: The domain name of the record.

add_blocklist.name: Add Blocklist
add_blocklist.description: Add a blocklist URL on all Pi-hole instances.

remove_blocklist.name: Remove Blocklist
remove_blocklist.description: Remove a blocklist URL from all Pi-hole instances.

toggle_blocklist.name: Toggle Blocklist
toggle_blocklist.description: Enable or disable a blocklist on all Pi-hole instances.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the blocklist should be enabled.

sync_all.name: Sync All
sync_all.description: Trigger a full data refresh on all Pi-hole instances.
